text.p: Hi Mazi ,
Thanks for your prompt reply. This is unlike those living in the developing countries who do not read their emails often.
Lets kick off with us. We are still man and wife. The children are yet to come, seven years after.

l can really see that you have done your home work about the country you will soon surjourn, God willing. Your determination too is a challenge. This shows that you will be neck-deep with your academic work once you set your foot in the former communist country. The rush by these people to London over the past months shows their own level of poverty. UK too is happy to see all new comers because the income tax and other deductions are so excruciating that people lament. Yet you can't beat the system or pack your load and leave, because people at home will ask what you have acheived abroad. lt is in "God's own country" where l visited last year that has what it takes to make life comfortable, in terms of cost of living.

How far with the Ph.D programme l thought you have been pursuing at UNI ? Are you abandoning it? l would have thought that you would complete that one first before making this other move so that you will be a hot cake with choices to make on completion. Ethiopia is today scrambling for Nigerian professors in various fields.
l shall "see" you some other time. Duty calls now.
Regards to and the children.
Cheers
Hi Mazi ,
How are you today, your family, church and fellowship?

You may have read my last mails. The mails may not have been too palatable l guess. l was just preparing you with some reality of what you are likely to encounter soon. l want to add this other dimension - ACCOMMODATION. You may need to find out if the fee quoted for you includes accommodation. Over here in London the rent is between £70-£100 a week. Multiply that by four to have the monthly rent in central London. At the periphery it is cheaper. This is not to say that the money comes that easy. The fact is that no one will squat another without the landlord adding to the rent. No church building takes in anyone so it is common to see people sleeping on the street even in Winter. l do not know what the rent is like in Poland. So it might be nice to sort this area out too to be sure.
lf l have tried compounding issues for you please pardon me, l consider it necessary to let you know some of these things. God bless you real good. Please don't fail to reply.
Cheers
Mazi ,

lt is nice coming your way after some delays on my part since spoke me. l was expecting to receive your mailing address from the pastor but what l got was your phone number. On the long run l have come to realise that your mail which he once copied me carries your address. Phone call will not undo what all these years of separation has caused especially when the high cost of phoning Africa is put into view. lf it were US you are calling from London you can speak for hours yet you haven't spent too much.
How is your family doing? Will l be able to recognise if l see her? Remember l still have her picture which you folks gave to me the last time l visited your house over seven years ago.

told me of your intrerest to study in Poland,which to me is a welcome idea, all things being equal. What l do not know now is the level your communication has gone as at today. He said he needed to write you a covering letter on whhich strenght they would give you visa. l need to know what l can do as contribution to this quest of yours
Write soon so that we can start talking.
Greet and the Childern for us.
Remain blessed.
Mazi ,

Welcome to obodo ndi ocha. l have really been postponing welcoming you online with the view of phoning you instead. l have now been incapacitated more because l do no want to call you when you are in class, or have you not started anything classroom? At the time l would consider appropriate to call l would be sleeping to prepare for my night job.

How have you been faring? There is no doubts that you have started finding your feet. l will call within the week, maybe on Sat. My cell phone no is . l cant give you the house no cause we are moving home next week, God willing.
Remain blessed.
Mazi ,
This is a happy news. Congratulations!

lt is not so nice that you are coming when the winters are setting in though. Not to worry. You shall overcome, but get yourself some winter jacket because you are most likely to start shivering right at the airport. l would have come looking for you at the airport with a jacket were it the UK you are headed.
Hear more of you later. ln any case our house number is while my mobile is .
Bless you.
Hi Mazi ,
How is the going? And how are your pikins and their mum doing?
l am writing to find out if the oyibo have finally answered your application or if they have started some delay tactics as they often do.
Please lets hear of the developments.
Have a nice day and may the Good Lord be merciful to you.
Cheers
Hi Mazi ,
Merry Christmas and a prosperous new year mazi . How are you doing?

Could you tell me why l cannot reach you with the phone number you supplied me? l have added 00 to using eurocity card meant for W.Europe, USA and Canada but was told that l was not allowed to reach this destination (which cannot be true because a colleague reaches his Polish family with it).
l'm waiting to hear from you soonest.
Cheers
Mazi ,

How are you today? So sorry we couldn't hear each other very well a couple of days ago via 's connection. lt's really been quite a while since we spoke last. One Sunday that l called you the line was so faint that you couldn't hear me before it went dead.
Congratulations for the success of your stay papers in . Bro told me about it and l rejoice with you.

l guess that it has not been very easy with you even though l do not know the state of things at the moment. told me you were making inquiries about vacation jobs in . l do not know much about it. lf you have any hint of anybody who has crossed over for much a programme do not fail to let me know so that l can follow up to konw the steps they took. The one that l am sure about are international students studying in the UK. They have the provision to work, even though they have a set number of hours per week which they mustn't exceed.
Please do me a piece soonest.
Remain blessed and cheers.
